title: [Kraken's Fall, Way of the Wise]
description: The way narrows through a gem-set golden arch.  Bright golden banners are draped from the walls and overhang the path, each embroidered with a detailed pattern of scrollwork.  Wall sconces holding silver candles are interspersed alongside these banners and light the way.  The floor has been assembled from a series of faded cloudy gemstones, each faintly etched with scrollwork.  Some wide stone benches are arranged before a golden velvet curtain leading inside.
